title: Use a GitHub App token instead of RELEASE_PAT for release automation
design:
# GitHub App トークンで RELEASE_PAT を置換 — 設計

目的: RELEASE_PAT（個人 PAT・期限管理が必要）を、リポジトリ専用 GitHub App の短命インストールトークンに置換。App 発行トークンは下流ワークフローを起動でき(GITHUB_TOKEN は不可)、個人アカウント非依存・自動失効・監査が app[bot] で明確。

## セクション1: GitHub App と認証経路

新規専用 App(ユーザー作成, Task 7 で置換):
- 名前例 redact-ner-ruby-release-bot, Webhook 無効
- Repository permissions: Contents RW, Pull requests RW のみ(他 No access)
- mitsuru/redact-ner-ruby のみインストール
- App ID を控え Private key(.pem) 生成
- Secret 登録: RELEASE_APP_ID, RELEASE_APP_PRIVATE_KEY

トークン発行(両 workflow 共通): 各ジョブ先頭で
  - uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
    id: app-token
    with: { app-id: secrets.RELEASE_APP_ID, private-key: secrets.RELEASE_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }
以降 checkout の token: と gh/git で steps.app-token.outputs.token を使用。

fail-fast: RELEASE_PAT の手動空チェックは不要(create-github-app-token が Secret 欠如/不正鍵で自失敗→checkout 前に停止)。RELEASE_PAT 完全撤去・フォールバック残さない。

適用範囲: release-prep.yml と release-tag-on-merge.yml 両方。release.yml(タグ push 起動・publish)は変更なし — App が push したタグが従来どおり起動。

## セクション2: 各ワークフローの変更

release-prep.yml:
- ジョブ先頭に create-github-app-token(id app-token)
- checkout に token: steps.app-token.outputs.token(release/vX.Y.Z ブランチ push をこのトークンで)
- Create branch/commit/open PR: GH_TOKEN を App トークンに(gh pr create が App 作成 PR→必要 CI 起動可)。git push も App トークン経由
- Generate notes / Guard duplicate / Create draft Release の GH_TOKEN も App トークンに統一
- main ブランチガード if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' 維持
- commit/タグ作者: App bot 同一性

release-tag-on-merge.yml:
- Verify RELEASE_PAT ステップ削除(App トークン発行が内在的 fail-fast)
- ジョブ先頭に create-github-app-token
- checkout token: secrets.RELEASE_PAT → steps.app-token.outputs.token
- git push origin "$tag" が App トークン経由で release.yml を起動(核心)
- ジョブ if(merged && base main && release ラベル/ブランチ)と冪等タグチェック維持
- commit/タグ作者: App bot 同一性(release-prep と統一)

release.yml: 変更なし。

## セクション3: author 同一性・Task 7・検証・ロールアウト

author 同一性(決定): App bot に設定。create-github-app-token の app-slug 出力を使い git config user.name "<slug>[bot]"、user.email "<bot-id>+<slug>[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"(bot id は gh api "/users/<slug>[bot]" -q .id)。commit/タグ/PR/Release すべて専用 App に帰属。

Task 7 全面置換(PAT 作成→App): (1) New GitHub App, Webhook 無効, Contents RW + Pull requests RW のみ (2) App ID 控え + Private key 生成 (3) mitsuru/redact-ner-ruby のみ Install (4) Secret RELEASE_APP_ID, RELEASE_APP_PRIVATE_KEY 登録。

検証: 全 workflow を actionlint 検証(startup_failure 教訓)。release-prep を bump=patch で dry-run→App が PR/draft Release 作成・publish/タグ起きない。PR マージ→release-tag-on-merge が App トークンでタグ push→release.yml 起動を実証。

ロールアウト: 専用ブランチ+PR で 2 workflow 変更、actionlint 緑、Task 7 を App 手順に書換、RELEASE_PAT 記述を plan/README から除去、レビュー後マージ。

スコープ外(YAGNI): org App、複数 repo 共有、App トークンの release.yml 展開。

不採用案: tag-on-merge のみ App 化(release-prep PR が将来必須 CI を起動できない)、既存 App 流用(権限スコープ不明確)、github-actions[bot] 維持(作成者と author 不一致)。
acceptance_criteria:
- 新規専用 GitHub App 手順が Task 7 として文書化(Contents RW + Pull requests RW のみ, 当該 repo のみ install, RELEASE_APP_ID/RELEASE_APP_PRIVATE_KEY Secret)
- release-prep.yml と release-tag-on-merge.yml が actions/create-github-app-token@v1 で App トークンを発行し、checkout token と gh/git 操作で使用
- release-tag-on-merge.yml の checkout token が secrets.RELEASE_PAT から App トークンに置換され、旧 Verify RELEASE_PAT ステップが削除されている
- release-prep.yml の PR 作成・push・gh 操作が App トークンを使用、main ブランチガード維持
- commit/タグ author が App bot 同一性(<slug>[bot] / <bot-id>+<slug>[bot]@users.noreply.github.com)に設定
- RELEASE_PAT への参照が workflow/plan/README から完全除去(単一機構)
- release.yml は不変、タグ push で従来どおり起動
- 全 .github/workflows/*.yml が actionlint クリーン
- dry-run: release-prep bump=patch で Release PR + draft Release 生成、publish/タグ発生なし
- end-to-end: Release PR マージで App トークンがタグ push し release.yml が起動(下流起動の実証)

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Supersedes the RELEASE_PAT mechanism introduced by redact-ner-ruby-rvk (PR #1, merged). Changes release-prep.yml + release-tag-on-merge.yml only; release.yml unchanged. Design validated via brainstorming.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Task 1 done (b23541a): release-tag-on-merge.yml -> App token, actionlint clean, spec+code-quality approved. Optional non-blocking hardening (carry, do not churn now): M1 permissions: contents: write now over-granted (push uses App token not GITHUB_TOKEN) -> could tighten to read/remove; M2 identity gh-api lookup runs before the idempotent tag early-exit -> a transient bot-user 404 fails a no-op re-run (low freq, fails loud); S1 SHA-pin actions/create-github-app-token (repo-wide policy).

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: DESIGN AMENDMENT (C1 from Task 2 code review): the dedicated App has only Contents RW + Pull requests RW, so 'gh label create release' (needs Issues:write) fails and 'gh pr create --label release' would then abort the job, stranding release/v* branch. Decision (user): DROP the 'release' label entirely. release-prep no longer creates/applies it; release-tag-on-merge triggers solely on startsWith(head.ref,'release/v') (already implemented & verified). Supersedes prior design/acceptance mentions of the 'release' label. App permissions stay minimal (Contents+PR RW). M1 (permissions: contents:write over-grant on both release-prep & release-tag-on-merge, default GITHUB_TOKEN unused) carried as non-blocking follow-up for both workflows uniformly.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Task 2 done: af6e1f1 (App token) + 481ecb0 (C1 fix: dropped release label). actionlint clean, spec+code-quality approved, downstream chain intact (release-tag-on-merge fires on release/v* head). Minor follow-up: the now-dead contains('release') branch in release-tag-on-merge if: is retained as harmless fallback, optional future cleanup.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Task 3 done (e1fe1dd): rvk plan Task 7 rewritten PAT->dedicated GitHub App, all 10 RELEASE_PAT refs removed, embedded YAML synced to actual App-token workflows + label drop. README had no RELEASE_PAT (unchanged). spec-compliant, doc-only.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Task 4 verification PASS: actionlint all workflows clean (both modes), rake test 12/0, release.yml byte-unchanged vs main, RELEASE_PAT removed from .github + rvk plan + README (only remaining mentions are in this impl plan release-app-token.md whose subject IS the removal - expected). Branch scope: release-prep.yml, release-tag-on-merge.yml, 2 plan docs only.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Final holistic review: READY TO MERGE, 8/8 static acceptance met, #9/#10 deferred (operational, post Task-7 App setup). Fixed: I1 (rvk plan Task 2 now has a supersession banner pointing to a2c — chose annotate over re-syncing ~25 lines of historical embedded YAML), M3 (Task 4 grep clarified to exclude this plan doc). Non-blocking carried follow-ups: M1 pre-existing SC2129 in release-prep Compute-next-version (not a regression, optional { } >> block cleanup), M2 dead contains('release') OR-clause in release-tag-on-merge if: (harmless, optional drop), plus earlier Task1 M1/M2/S1 (permissions tighten / identity-before-early-exit / SHA-pin).

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Opened PR #2 (https://github.com/mitsuru/redact-ner-ruby/pull/2), base main. Implementation complete, final review ready-to-merge. Keep a2c in_progress until PR #2 merged + Task 7 (dedicated GitHub App + RELEASE_APP_ID/RELEASE_APP_PRIVATE_KEY secrets) done + dry-run/e2e verified. Note: this supersedes the RELEASE_PAT prerequisite from rvk — the user prerequisite is now the GitHub App, not a PAT.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Dry-run PASS (acceptance #9): Release Prep dispatched bump=patch on main (App-token version, run 25993756852 success). Verified: PR #3 release/v0.1.2->main authored by app/redactreleasebot (App bot), NO label; draft Release v0.1.2 (isDraft=true, no git tag); rubygems unchanged (0.1.1 only, no publish); PR diff = version.rb 0.1.2 + CHANGELOG [0.1.2] section+ref only. App-token auth fully working end to merge gate. #10 (e2e: merge PR#3 -> tag -> release.yml publish) pending user decision.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: BUG found via first real dry-run (PR #3 CI red, all Ruby): release-prep.yml bumps version.rb (changes gemspec RedactNer::VERSION) but its commit step only 'git add lib/redact_ner/version.rb CHANGELOG.md' — Gemfile.lock's 'redact_ner (X.Y.Z)' PATH spec stays stale, so ci.yml frozen 'bundle install' fails (exit 16, 'gemspecs for path gems changed'). Pre-existing latent bug from rvk era (relicense 0.1.1 only worked because Gemfile.lock was hand-bumped). Fix: run 'bundle lock' after the version bump and include Gemfile.lock in the Release PR commit. Hotfix to main (like the earlier startup_failure fix); abort broken dry-run (PR#3/branch/draft) and re-dispatch.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Gemfile.lock hotfix verified (4aed10e + d66c582 --conservative). Re-dispatched Release Prep: PR #4 release/v0.1.2 by app/redactreleasebot, no label, files = version.rb + CHANGELOG + Gemfile.lock; Gemfile.lock diff is version-only (redact_ner 0.1.1->0.1.2, no dep drift / no BUNDLED WITH churn). PR #4 CI GREEN (Ruby 3.2/3.3/3.4/4.0). draft Release v0.1.2 (draft, no tag), rubygems still 0.1.1 (no publish). Acceptance #9 (dry-run) now fully PASS with the bug fixed; #10 (e2e) pending user decision.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Dry-run aborted/cleaned per user: PR #4 closed, release/v0.1.2 branch + draft Release v0.1.2 deleted; rubygems unchanged (0.1.1). DELIVERED: App-token migration merged to main (PR #2) + Gemfile.lock hotfix (4aed10e, --conservative d66c582); acceptance #9 (dry-run) fully PASS. #10 (e2e real publish) intentionally deferred to the next genuine release (0.1.2 had no library content). Keeping a2c in_progress per prior user preference; feature is effectively complete pending only opportunistic e2e on a future real release.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: E2E COMPLETE (acceptance #10 MET in production): user ran the proper route — Release Prep -> PR #5 (release/v0.1.2) -> merged -> release-tag-on-merge pushed v0.1.2 tag as redactreleasebot[bot] (App token, NOT GITHUB_TOKEN — core mechanism proven) -> release.yml run 25994505757 all green incl publish -> rubygems env approved -> 0.1.2 published (6 gems MIT/Apache) + GitHub Release v0.1.2 un-drafted with 6 assets. PR #5 CI passed (Gemfile.lock hotfix works). gem install redact_ner -v 0.1.2 OK. 0.1.1 intact. Feature fully delivered & validated end-to-end.

title: Automate release prep: version bump, CHANGELOG, draft GitHub Release
design:
# リリース準備自動化 設計

目的: version bump・CHANGELOG 確定・draft GitHub Release 作成を自動化し、人間のレビューゲート（Release PR + draft Release）を挟んで既存 release.yml の publish に繋ぐ。起動は手動ディスパッチ（bump レベル指定）、内容ソースは GitHub generate_release_notes。

## セクション1: 全体フローと release-prep.yml

新規 .github/workflows/release-prep.yml（workflow_dispatch）
- 入力: bump（patch / minor / major の choice。明示版指定は YAGNI で除外）
- 処理:
  1. lib/redact_ner/version.rb の現行版 + bump から新版 X.Y.Z を算出
  2. version.rb を新版に書き換え
  3. GitHub generate-notes API（POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/releases/generate-notes, tag_name=vX.Y.Z, previous_tag_name=直近タグ）でノート生成
  4. CHANGELOG.md に `## [X.Y.Z] - YYYY-MM-DD` を生成ノートで追加、`## [Unreleased]` プレースホルダと末尾リンク参照（[X.Y.Z]: と [Unreleased]: compare）を更新
  5. ブランチ release/vX.Y.Z に commit、Release PR 作成（ラベル release 付与）
  6. draft GitHub Release を vX.Y.Z（tag 未作成のまま draft 可）で同じ生成ノート本文で作成
- 権限: contents: write, pull-requests: write（GITHUB_TOKEN）
- 既存 release.yml は維持。README の手動 Releasing 手順は本フローに置換。

## セクション2: Release PR マージ → 自動タグ → publish

新規 .github/workflows/release-tag-on-merge.yml
- トリガー: pull_request closed、条件 merged==true かつ base=main かつ Release PR 識別（release ラベル または head が release/v*）
- 処理: マージ後 main を checkout → version.rb から X.Y.Z → 同名タグ非存在を確認（冪等ガード）→ 注釈付きタグ vX.Y.Z 作成・push
- 権限: contents: write。非 Release PR では早期 return。

タグ push → 既存 release.yml 起動（変更最小）
- cross-gem(5) + source-gem + smoke(5) は実証済み構成
- publish ジョブ（if refs/tags/v*、environment rubygems 承認ゲート、OIDC Trusted Publishing）で 6 gem を rubygems.org へ
- GitHub Release の扱いを変更: 現状の softprops/action-gh-release@v2（generate_release_notes・即時公開）を、既存 draft Release の「公開化 + 資産添付」に置換:
  - gh release upload vX.Y.Z dist/*.gem
  - gh release edit vX.Y.Z --draft=false --latest
  - 本文は再生成しない（cut 時生成、レビュー中の手編集を保持）
- 結果整合性: gem push は不可逆。順序は gem push → Release 公開化。Release 公開化は冪等（再 run で --draft=false 再適用可）。

## セクション3: CHANGELOG/ノート生成の詳細とエッジケース

generate-notes 取得（タグ未作成でも可）: gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/releases/generate-notes -f tag_name=vX.Y.Z -f target_commitish=main -f previous_tag_name=<直近 v*> → .body。直近タグは最新 v* タグ、無ければ previous 省略。

CHANGELOG 反映: 新セクションは生成ノートをそのまま `## [X.Y.Z] - YYYY-MM-DD` 配下に転記（Keep a Changelog の細分はしない）。既存 0.1.0/0.1.1 手書きセクションは保持。Unreleased は空維持。末尾リンク参照に [X.Y.Z] 追加、[Unreleased] compare 更新。日付は実行日（UTC）。

draft Release 本文 = CHANGELOG 新セクションと同一の生成ノート（単一ソース）。CHANGELOG/Release 本文は PR レビューで人が確定。publish 時に Release 本文を再生成しないため最終本文＝レビュー後 draft 本文。

エッジケース:
- release/vX.Y.Z ブランチ/PR/draft 既存 → fail-fast（重複 cut 防止）
- bump は X.Y.Z のみ（pre-release/build メタデータ非対応 YAGNI）
- Release PR を close（マージせず）→ タグ生成は merged==true で不発。branch/draft は手動削除（README 明記）
- generate-notes 空 → "No notable changes." を本文に

## セクション4: 検証戦略とロールアウト

検証:
1. bump 計算の単体検証: 0.1.1+patch→0.1.2 / +minor→0.2.0 / +major→1.0.0 をローカル表明
2. release-prep ドライ実走（bump=patch）: 生成物（branch/PR/draft/diff）目視。gem 公開は起きない（タグ未作成）
3. タグ生成検証: PR マージ → release-tag-on-merge がタグ push → release.yml 起動、publish は rubygems Env 承認ゲートで停止（未承認なら未公開で安全）
4. Release 公開化検証: 承認後 draft が --draft=false 化 + 6 gem 添付
5. ロールバック性: publish 前は PR close + branch/draft 削除で原状復帰（不可逆要素なし）

ロールアウト順:
1. bump 計算ロジック確定（ローカル表明）
2. release-prep.yml 追加 → ドライ実走、生成物確認（PR は close で破棄）
3. release-tag-on-merge.yml 追加
4. release.yml の GitHub Release ステップを draft 公開化 + 資産添付に置換
5. README Releasing 節を新フローに更新
6. 次回実リリースで end-to-end 実証

スコープ外（YAGNI）: 明示バージョン入力、pre-release/build メタデータ、Conventional Commits 連動、CHANGELOG 自動カテゴリ分割、複数同時リリース。

採用しなかった案: release-please 型（コミット規約前提のため不採用）、main 直 commit+タグ push（レビューゲート無しのため不採用）、Unreleased 手管理 / コミット付録併用（generate_release_notes 単一ソースに一本化）。
acceptance_criteria:
- workflow_dispatch の release-prep.yml が存在し、入力 bump=patch/minor/major を受ける
- bump 計算が 0.1.1+patch→0.1.2 / +minor→0.2.0 / +major→1.0.0 で正しい（ローカル表明テストあり）
- release-prep 実走で: version.rb 更新 / CHANGELOG に新 `## [X.Y.Z] - DATE` セクション+リンク参照更新 / release/vX.Y.Z ブランチ + release ラベル付き Release PR / draft GitHub Release が生成され、gem は一切公開されない
- release-tag-on-merge.yml が Release PR の main へのマージ（merged==true, release ラベル/ブランチ識別）でのみ vX.Y.Z 注釈付きタグを作成・push し、非 Release PR では何もしない（冪等ガードで二重タグ防止）
- タグ push で既存 release.yml が起動、publish は rubygems Environment 承認ゲートで停止
- 承認後、既存 draft Release が --draft=false 化され 6 gem 資産が添付され、本文は cut 時/レビュー後の内容が保持される（再生成されない）
- 重複 cut（既存 release/vX.Y.Z）や generate-notes 空などのエッジケースが設計どおり処理される
- README の Releasing 節が新フローに更新されている
- 既存 release.yml の cross/source/smoke 構成と Trusted Publishing 挙動が回帰していない

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Tasks 1-4 done on feature/release-automation (subagent-driven, each spec+code-quality reviewed): T1 next_version.rb+tests (f8c2c37), T2 release-prep.yml (e160d30, C1/I1/M1/M2 fixed), T3 release-tag-on-merge.yml (35f199e, RELEASE_PAT + I1 fail-fast), T4 release.yml publish un-draft step (185fa71). Remaining: T5 README, T7 user RELEASE_PAT prereq, T6 dry-run.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Implementation complete on feature/release-automation; opened PR #1 (https://github.com/mitsuru/redact-ner-ruby/pull/1). Final holistic review: ready to merge, all 9 acceptance criteria met. Remaining (operational, post-merge): Task 7 = user creates RELEASE_PAT repo secret (fine-grained, contents:write); Task 6 = post-merge dry-run (dispatch Release Prep bump=patch, verify Release PR + draft Release + no publish/tag). Keep issue in_progress until PR merged + dry-run verified. Non-blocking minors in separate follow-up issue.

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Post-merge: PR#1 merged to main but release-prep.yml had a GitHub Actions startup_failure (run 25991218300). Root cause: a literal ${{ }} inside a shell comment in a run: block — GHA parses expressions even in comments; the empty one fails the workflow at startup. Ruby YAML.load_file (used in all task verifications) accepted it; actionlint catches it. Fixed on main (4d4af82), rephrased comment, actionlint now clean for all workflows. ci.yml CI on the merge passed (Ruby 3.2-4.0).

comments.author: Mitsuru Hayasaka
comments.text: Follow-up redact-ner-ruby-a2c will replace RELEASE_PAT (Task 7) with a dedicated GitHub App token (actions/create-github-app-token). rvk's RELEASE_PAT-based Task 7 is superseded once a2c lands; keep rvk in_progress until a2c merged + dry-run done.

title: Add actionlint to CI for workflow validation
design: release-prep.yml shipped a GitHub Actions startup_failure (literal ${{ }} in a run-block comment) that passed every review because verification used Ruby 'YAML.load_file' (YAML-valid) but never GHA-schema/expression validation. Add actionlint to ci.yml (or a dedicated workflow-lint job) running on PRs touching .github/workflows/**, so GHA-schema/expression errors are caught pre-merge. Pin actionlint version. Acceptance: a PR introducing an invalid workflow expression fails CI before merge.

title: Release-automation/App-token non-blocking follow-ups (a2c)
design:
Non-blocking items deferred from redact-ner-ruby-a2c (GitHub App token) reviews; none block PR #2:
- Permissions least-privilege: release-prep.yml & release-tag-on-merge.yml still declare permissions: contents: write (and pull-requests: write) but the default GITHUB_TOKEN is now unused (all auth via App token). Tighten to contents: read / drop pull-requests, after confirming no step relies on the default token.
- release-tag-on-merge.yml if: retains a now-dead contains(labels,'release') OR-clause (release-prep no longer applies the label; App lacks Issues:write so it can't be auto-applied). Optional: drop the OR-clause, leaving only startsWith(head.ref,'release/v').
- Pre-existing actionlint SC2129 in release-prep.yml 'Compute next version' (multiple >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT). Not a regression; optional { ...; } >> block cleanup.
- Task 1 (tag-on-merge) hardening: move the gh-api bot-user identity lookup AFTER the idempotent tag early-exit so a no-op re-run isn't failed by a transient 404; SHA-pin actions/create-github-app-token.
Do these as a batch once PR #2 is merged and the dedicated GitHub App is set up.

title: Release-automation follow-ups (M1/M2/M3 from final review)
design:
Non-blocking minors from feature/release-automation final review:
- M1: release-prep.yml appends [X.Y.Z] CHANGELOG link ref at bottom → not reverse-chron order. Markdown link refs are order-independent; cosmetic only.
- M2: release.yml publish step uses 'gh release edit --latest' unconditionally. A future backport hotfix (e.g. v0.1.3 after v0.2.0) would be wrongly marked GitHub Latest. Add a highest-version guard if/when a backport track exists (YAGNI now).
- M3: doc wording 'builds the 5 precompiled gems + source gem' (README/plan) vs '6 gems' (plan L7). Same meaning; harmless. Optionally unify wording.
None block the 0.1.2 first automated release.

value: Verify GitHub Actions workflow files with actionlint, NOT just Ruby YAML.load_file. GHA parses ${{ }} expressions even inside shell comments in run: blocks; an empty/invalid one causes a silent workflow startup_failure (no jobs, no annotation via API). 'YAML.load_file' accepts it. actionlint catches it deterministically: /tmp/actionlint -shellcheck= .github/workflows/*.yml
